steps.title: Find the hourly rate
steps.content: The table gives the points $(1,155)$ and $(3,285)$. The rate of change is $$\frac{285-155}{3-1}=\frac{130}{2}=65.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The linear model is $$f(h)=65h+90.$$ It gives $f(1)=155$ and $f(3)=285$, so it fits the table. C is correct.
